name: generic-json-integrity-demo
goal: Create domain-neutral JSON artifacts and verify parseability, required fields, unique stems, unique IDs, and minimum count.
command_argv: from pathlib import Path; import json; root=Path('demo_json/cards'); root.mkdir(parents=True, exist_ok=True); (root/'alpha.json').write_text(json.dumps({'id':'alpha','kind':'demo','payload':{'ok': True}}, ensure_ascii=False), encoding='utf-8'); (root/'beta.json').write_text(json.dumps({'id':'beta','kind':'demo','payload':{'ok': True}}, ensure_ascii=False), encoding='utf-8')
evidence: demo_json/cards contains two parseable domain-neutral JSON cards.
gotchas: This verifier is generic: it checks artifact integrity, not domain semantics.
return_seeds: Use json_collection_health before writing a project-specific semantic verifier.
